title: Update /up endpoint — HTML format response (green page)
description:
When the `/up` endpoint is requested with `Accept: text/html`, it should return a minimal HTML page with a green background indicating the service is healthy. Example implementation: ```html Up

Service is up and running

``` Parent ticket: https://linear.app/axbots/issue/TES-18/update-up-endpoint
scope: Implement and test the HTML response variant of the /up endpoint that renders a green status page.
acceptance_criteria: GET /up with Accept: text/html returns HTTP 200
Page has a visually green background (inline style or CSS class)
Page contains human-readable text confirming the service is up
RSpec test covers the HTML format path
relation_to_original: Implements the 'html — green page' requirement from the parent ticket.
